QueryCdsPrices.storageType: CDS disk storage type, including SSD_Enhanced (Enhanced SSD), cloud_hp1 (General Purpose SSD), hp1 (High Performance Cloud Disk), and hdd (General Purpose HDD). Default is hp1.
QueryCdsPrices.storageType.hdd: General Purpose HDD (this type is being gradually deprecated)
QueryCdsPrices.storageType.sata: Previous-generation cloud disk, dedicated for DCC sub-instance creation
QueryCdsPrices.storageType.local_ssd: Data stored on local SSD with low latency, good IO and throughput performance, suitable for medium-to-large relational database workloads
QueryCdsPrices.storageType.local_hdd 或 std1: Local HDD disk, suitable for large-scale data storage scenarios
QueryCdsPrices.storageType.local_nvme 或 nvme: Local NVMe disk, data stored on local NVMe SSD with ultra-high performance, suitable for latency-sensitive workloads
QueryCdsPrices.paymentTiming: Payment method, either Postpaid (pay-as-you-go) or Prepaid (subscription).
QueryCdsPrices.purchaseCount: Total price for any number of CDS disks; must be a positive integer greater than 0; optional parameter, defaults to 1
